name: Avatar
purpose: Identity marker for users, agents, companies, and data sources across the console.

structures.name: Initials Avatar
structures.notes: Token-driven background with high-contrast initials; used when no image exists.

structures.name: Status Avatar
structures.notes: Trailing status dot for online or running agents using chart tokens.

structures.name: Avatar Group
structures.notes: Overlapped stack with a trailing count for collaborators or sources.

interactionNotes: Company avatars use a rounded square; people and agents use circles.
Background tones should cycle through chart tokens for stable, calm variety.
